faqs.question: Why are carpenter ants common in Hamilton Heights buildings?
faqs.answer: Hamilton Heights' abundance of pre-war buildings with original wooden structures, mature street trees, and proximity to St. Nicholas and Riverside Parks provide ideal habitats for carpenter ants. These insects are attracted to moisture-damaged wood often found in older buildings, making professional inspection and treatment essential for Hamilton Heights properties.
